acceptance_criteria: Focused row, focused cell, selected range, and workflow-action targeting remain visibly unambiguous before finalize or handoff actions.

assertions.label: Workflow target label always displays the focused order identity
assertions.expected: The command strip shows 'Workflow target: focused order SO-XXX' when any order row is focused.
assertions.observed: OrdersSheetPilotSurface.tsx:329-331 computes workflowActionTargetLabel from selectedOrderRow.orderNumber. Unit test confirms 'Workflow target: focused order SO-002' appears on single-row selection.

assertions.label: Workflow actions are disabled when selection spans multiple rows
assertions.expected: When selectedRowCount > 1, all row-scoped workflow buttons (Edit Draft, Delete Draft, Accounting, Shipping) are disabled with explanatory guardrail text.
assertions.observed: OrdersSheetPilotSurface.tsx:327-340 computes rowScopedActionsBlocked = queueSelectionTouchesMultipleRows. Lines 460, 477, 488, 507 pass disabled={rowScopedActionsBlocked}. Unit test confirms all 3 buttons are disabled on 2-row selection with guardrail message.

assertions.label: Workflow actions are enabled when selection stays within one row
assertions.expected: When selectedRowCount <= 1, row-scoped workflow buttons are enabled based on order state (confirmed for accounting/shipping, draft for edit/delete).
assertions.observed: Unit test confirms accounting and shipping buttons are NOT disabled on single-row selection of confirmed order SO-002. Guardrail text shows 'Workflow actions remain explicit row-scoped actions.'

assertions.label: Guardrail text explains targeting rules for both selection states
assertions.expected: Single-row: 'Workflow actions remain explicit row-scoped actions.' Multi-row: 'Spreadsheet selection spans multiple rows. Workflow actions stay locked until the focused row is the only selected row in scope.'
assertions.observed: OrdersSheetPilotSurface.tsx:332-334. Both messages confirmed by unit tests.

SALE-ORD-034.evidence: Workflow targeting disambiguation is fully implemented and unit-tested. The focused order identity, multi-row lockout, and single-row enablement are all proven through OrdersSheetPilotSurface tests.
SALE-ORD-034.residual: Live staging proof needed for live-proven promotion.
